name: 6-Day Tour: Tangier → Chefchaouen → Fes → Sahara → Marrakech

seo.title: 6-Day Tangier to Marrakech Tour — Chefchaouen, Fes, Merzouga Sahara | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 6-day tour from Tangier to Marrakech: Chefchaouen, Fes (guide), Merzouga (Erg Chebbi), Todra, Dades, Ait Ben Haddou, Tizi n'Tichka. Transport and accommodation included.

intro: This 6-day tour connects Tangier to Marrakech through the north and south of Morocco: the blue pearl of Chefchaouen, the Fes medina with an official guide, the Erg Chebbi desert in Merzouga (night in camp), the Todra Gorges, the Dades Valley, Ait Ben Haddou and the Tizi n'Tichka pass.
